name: player_name
description: Full player name as returned by Stokastic (e.g. LeBron James)

name: opponent
description: Opposing team abbreviation for this game

name: position
description: DFS roster position slot (PG, SG, SF, PF, C, G, F, UTIL, etc.)

name: game_date
description: Date of the DraftKings slate (partition key)

name: game_time
description: Game start time as UTC ISO string (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS)

name: contest_type
description: DFS site: DK = DraftKings, FD = FanDuel

name: slate_id
description: Stokastic internal slate ID for this contest

name: projected_ownership_pct
description: Projected DFS contest ownership percentage (0-100). High values (30%+) indicate popular/recreational targets — signal hypothesis: correlated with over-inflated prop lines (UNDER value).

name: projected_salary
description: DraftKings player salary in dollars for this slate

name: projected_points
description: Stokastic projected DraftKings fantasy point total

name: projection_std_dev
description: Standard deviation of projected DK points (higher = boom/bust player)

name: dk_value
description: DK value = projected_points / salary * 1000 (higher = better salary efficiency)

name: injury_status
description: Injury designation at scrape time: Unknown, Questionable, Out, etc.

name: confirmed_lineup
description: True if the player's lineup/starting status has been confirmed by tip-off

name: dk_player_id
description: DraftKings player ID (extracted from Stokastic nameAndId field)

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this record was collected by the scraper

name: source_file_path
description: GCS path of the source JSON file written by the scraper
